name: Staphylinidae
diagnosis: The rove beetles are a family (Staphylinidae) of beetles, primarily distinguished by their short elytra (wing covers) that typically leave more than half of their abdomens exposed. With roughly 63,000 species in thousands of genera, the group is currently recognized as the largest extant family of beetles. It is an ancient group, with fossilized rove beetles known from the Triassic, 200 million years ago, and possibly even earlier if the genus Leehermania proves to be a...

genus_notes.necrophila: Necrophila is a genus of carrion beetles, with around 20 species: most found in Asia and India, and one species in North America, Necrophila americana.
genus_notes.platydracus: Platydracus is a genus of rove beetles in the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.oiceoptoma: Oiceoptoma is a genus of carrion beetles.
genus_notes.nicrophorus: Burying beetles or sexton beetles (genus Nicrophorus) are the best-known members of the family Silphidae (carrion beetles).
genus_notes.creophilus: Creophilus is a genus of beetles of the Staphylinidae family, Staphylinidae subfamily.
genus_notes.philonthus: Philonthus is a genus of large rove beetles in the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.belonuchus: Belonuchus is a genus of large rove beetles in the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.hesperus: In Greek mythology, Hesperus (/ˈhɛspərəs/; Ancient Greek: Ἕσπερος, romanized: Hésperos) is the Evening Star, the planet Venus in the evening.
genus_notes.homaeotarsus: Homaeotarsus is a genus of rove beetles in the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.tachinus: Tachinus is a genus of crab-like rove beetles in the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.necrodes: Necrodes is a genus of carrion beetles in the family Silphidae.
genus_notes.sunius: Sunius is a genus of rove beetles in the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.astenus: Astenus is a genus of rove beetles.
genus_notes.meronera: Meronera is a genus of rove beetles in the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.olophrum: Olophrum is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.oxyporus: Oxyporus is a genus of polypore fungi in the family Schizoporaceae.
genus_notes.coproporus: Coproporus is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.lordithon: Lordithon is a genus of beetles belonging to the family Staphylinidae.
genus_notes.paederus: Paederus is a genus of small beetles of the family Staphylinidae ("rove beetles").
